message:
fix(runtime): lowercase command names in WrongArity error messages (Redis parity)

Redis 7.x uses lowercase command names in "ERR wrong number of arguments
for 'xxx' command" errors. Applied .to_ascii_lowercase() in the
command_error_to_resp WrongArity handler. Updated 324 error expectations
across 32 conformance fixture files and 3 runtime unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
